Contenido: now my favorite fromsoft game tldr here phenomenal and rich combat beautiful world packed with secrets dark and twisted story that is never spoon fed to the player the game does have some performance issues it runs just fine but on the borders of loading zones the game will drop frames even with beefy computerphenomenal combat taking elements from demons souls through sekiro the stance system brought in from sekiro is the highlight of the combat the game truly rewards heavy attacks torrent the players steed offers another layer of combat mechanics there are many styles of fighting to master and the game offers the player the opportunity to explore different styles throughout the gamefighting in this game is difficult to access and the player wont make real progress until at least moderate level of mastery is obtained there is boss that serves as filter and the player can not progress through the story related dungeon until they have some level of knowledge however the upside of this is that the skill ceiling is very high i have well over 2000 hours across their catalog of games and i was not able to stop using my shield until nearly halfway through the game i am very stubborn though and if i had tried different methods of play i would have had much more success in many ways elden ring is more difficult than any fromsoft game but also easier than any other because of the numerous options the player hasbeautiful world full of challenging enemies less linear than any fromsoft game prior and done beautifully the player is encouraged to explore and rewarded for it there is also massive plethora of completely optional content that hides incredible levels and bosses level design is fantastic including looping dungeons with many paths of progress tons of clever shortcuts including around story dungeons wandering in the lands between is challenging often terrifying and always rewarding spend your time collecting items and finding new parts of areas you have already been to and you will unlock even more of the massive worldstory in elden ring is presented to the player much like it is in the dark souls series item descriptions and careful observation will lead the player to draw their own conclusions the player is faced with choices that have impact on the story and these are not minor choices or impacts they all contribute to different endings only one of which i have experienced deep and rich factions will present themselves to the player and it really is difficult to know which one is right the story is dark and disgusting at times and many characters are mere hollow husks of the heroes they once were there are scarred battlefields of stalemate wars and these battles are explained through item descriptionsfromsoft rewards skilled observant and curious players this game is not for people who want casual game to wander in this game is for players seeking to challenge themselves and explore dark and twisted world at their own peril this game wont be for everyone and that is okayspoilers blade of spoilers is the most challenging rewarding and beautiful boss i have faced in fromsoft game this boss alone could make this game go to second on my list of from titleselden ring currently what many would consider serious performance issues loading zones have been an issue for fromsoft in the past and this game makes those issues quite apparent when on the junction of few loading zone borders the game can drop frames like crazy i have 5700xt and at highultra settings under good conditions at 1440p i get stable 60fps in heavy combat with lots of enemies the framerate is still stable the framerate issues are entirely down to loading zone borders fromsoft is not lazy company and i am confident that the issue will be improved over time but it is present currentlyi rate this game 9510 if it performed correctly all the time i would rate it an 1010 this is my favorite game in my steam libraryediti have now played an additional 240 hours and done some thinkingi think that this game is objectively better than any souls game prior including demons souls with this said elden ring is also perhaps my favorite game ever and my least favorite souls game i realize that these are contradictory allow to explainthis game is phenomenal for all the reasons listed above i feel that as of patch 106 the game is quite well balanced and quite bug free especially for game of this scope if we think of other large scale aaa open world games like skyrim or cyberpunk the state of the game currently is much more finished than either skyrim or cyberpunk especially after only 6 months my overall rating is solid 1010 it is highly refined masterworksince it is masterwork it is not my favorite souls game i lack that absolutely charming and endearing feeling that dks1 gave and demons souls gives the same nostalgic fuzzy feeling dks2 is obviously diamond in the rough and dks3 is even better than des or 1 or 2 but i didnt like it as much just now after struggling with how to phrase this for months i have come up with sentence to summarize some semblance of sentimentsomething about having an incredibly powerful formula and framework already developed removes the creative challenge of developing new framework to fit the narrative of the game the penultimate soulsborne formula found within elden ring constrains froms creative genius to its own creative frameworkwith the existing souls formula refined to micronperfect polish all they could do with elden ring was make big dark souls tmhowever this level of polish can not be put into oneoff game like demons souls dark souls 1 bloodborne or sekiro the magic is lost on since i have seen all of these things that exist within the lands between before in one way or another the erdtree to it is really big golden stone archtree that exists above firelink ive seen the darkmoon greatsword more times than i care to admit ive slain countless from dragons ive seen plenty of curved greatswords you get the point im not talking about reused assets or anything like that they save the developer time and money and improve the game if used correctly and sparingly using prior experience only serves to make better game however blizzard and activision and bethesda have already lost as customers as they are completely unwilling to do anything new i am sick of this creative rot that needlessly and inevitably consumes everyone who becomes successful fromsoft is quite literally the only horse left in town the only studio with the balls to say f u consequences be damned they made the safe choice with elden ring and the safe choice is rarely the correct one i love fromsoftware from the bottom of my heart and that is the only reason i criticize them so harshly herethere are moments of brilliance here the boss fights the ones that dont gank you with recycled enemy are so refined that they may be the best ive ever experienced sekiro may still take the cake but er is close they can adapt to variety of playstyles very well and the game was built with this in mind torrent is the one moment of brilliance that i can really say yes they pushed the limit of what they knew and did something completely novel and made the game better because of it all the other game mechanics narrative elements discoveries and moments i feel like ive seen them before they feel comfortable and knownfromsoftware can do so much better but because elden ring is literally the culmination of 12 years of mastering the same formula they can not do better than elden ring while stepping outside familiar framework it makes sad
positive_highlights: ['phenomenal and rich combat', 'beautiful world packed with secrets', 'dark and twisted story']
negative_points: ['performance issues with frame drops near loading zones', 'feels too similar to previous FromSoftware games (safe choice)', 'some recycled enemy types']
summary: Elden Ring is a phenomenal and rich game with beautiful world and twisted story, but suffers from some performance issues and feels too similar to previous FromSoftware titles, though objectively a masterpiece.

Contenido: controversy the gamefor some people who had actively anticipated cyberpunk 2077 ever since its announcement closely watched every trailer and got themselves hyped up beyond belief the game turned out to be very disappointing luckily im convinced at least i didnt look forward to the game much at all and the only real appeal i saw was the collaboration with one of my current favorite musicians grimes who produced song for the ingame radio and voiced one of the sidequest characters other than that i really couldnt care less about this game but bought into the hype week or so prior to its release and partially transferred my wealth anyway and here we arewithout any further ado im just going to say that few games ever made so invested in them to make it little more bearable to read through ill divide my thoughts into three different paragraphsthe good 1 the designs they are absolutely stunning here from main characters to someone youll only hear few lines from throughout the game from dangerous and scary adam smasher to soothing and routine judy applies to the ingame street ads everything ever so slightly related to the samurai band later about that and clothing for the most part stellar 2 the graphics alright im guilty this very game kinda made upgrade my gpu sooner than i wanted to naturally do so its mind boggling with rtx on ive never seen any other game look prettier the sights you see while driving through the city at night are worth lot by itself 3 the characters each and every from the main character cast is very memorable and well written whenever johnny and yes the trope with the iconic character that only the protagonist can see due to said characters being inside their head is as old as the world examples arkham knight tales from the borderlands appears and starts talking about his terrorist past or just says something disturbing in general you cant help yourself but feel like hes all for real hes just that much of an idealist and you grow to love him for that at least thats the case with you either love johnny to bits or hate his guts inbetween from what ive heard but even the secondary characters like takemura and rogue are to be remembered and have countless things and unique character features to cherish them for 4 side missions just as rich if not even richer as the main story campaign while some of them are lackluster and unapologetically short quest lines such as dream on and the story of convicted murderer wanting to make difference through his newly acquired faith are going to stay with you for long long time all of the secondary quests related to samurai and silverhands past are also win the bickering between the former band members feels like those are the conflicts that couldve easily happened between any of the days of glory longtime passed rock bands be it say metallica or deep purple really authentic 5 the story yes as simple as that i really liked the main story of the game and the way it was flowing full of memorable encounters and events its the meat of the game and keeps you invested throughout written beautifully 6 the symbolism if you as silly as it sounds question yourself what makes human different from god wonder about afterlife and are curious about when does ones life truly end thats the right game to feast on the themes of faith yes faith not religion please never ever mix them together are touched very authentically in one of the sidequests too 7 audio and music the original soundtrack is perfect fit for this world from the menacing and grim v and consumer cathedral to the banging midtempo roller of the rebel path radio music is also great curated by the likes of run the jewels nina kraviz and grimes the latter contributed an absolutely stunning delicate weapon exclusively for the game too easily my favorite from all of the originals from cyberpunk 2077 the meh 1 gameplay yes as sad as it is the game gets little boring to play after while which is cardinal for game like this vehicles feel just okay the gunplay is borderline alright and the quickhack system is fun for while until you realize it was done better even in the first watch_dogs game only the story and the characters kept interested in immersing myself in more of the repetitiveness 2 customization yes sure you can customize your character to oblivion but thats about it you cant even change their haircut later on the clothing system is revolving purely around the stats and will force you to wear things you dislike for that sweetsweet combat advantage cars cant be customized whatsoever but luckily i never really cared about them in the first place but i have to admit that the game really allowed to shape and make my character exactly the way i want them to be even though if you cant be nonbinary in 2077 which i assume you cant since everyone keeps referring to you as to or she exclusively and the game doesnt really give you third option cdpr are completely missing some really important attributes of the cyberpunk genre as whole 3 cyberware oh they advertised it as the pinnacle of videogame customization but more often than not its just another way to improve your stats with visible changes only few of the implants actually change you in drastic way but what about cyberpsychosis you might ask obviously you cant go insane because of all of the chrome in your body like you can in the pennpaper rpg thatd be way too deep for triple 2020 game right 4 consequences of your actions they are kinda there some of the things you do early on really affect the story and the flow of the later side missions but is it really game changing not in slightest another overly advertised and underdelivered feature the bad 1 technical issues rtx 3060 with an i58400 are giving 5560 fps on highultra with medium rtx and dlss on what talk about optimization the amount of bugs and glitches is legendary not even worth mentioning at this point 2 expectations cdpr had it coming really never seen game advertised like that before could even order collaborative pizza from local pizzeria chain packaged in cyberpunk themed box the media the trailers the demos for the streamers its very sad you cant really see all this greatness in the game itself the expectations were set too high and we received an undercooked product as simple as that and its ones fault but cdprs conclusion so is the game really worth playing yes but not now ive had lot of fun diving deep into the games world and i have to give all of my praise to the designers writers and musicians that made it all possible for its one of my new favorite universes and i would love to play the tabletop rpg now but the amount of technical issues and broken promises is really offputting just give the developers sometime to actually fix the game might take year or even more and if you dont mind the gameplay being little underwhelming but care about the world and the characters of the game absolutely go for it now is not the time however yet im still glad i enjoyed the game seemingly lot more than some of the people i know dont have your expectation high and you will never be disappointed
negative_points: ['technical issues', 'underwhelming gameplay', 'broken promises']
summary: Cyberpunk 2077 has stunning designs, graphics and characters, but is let down by technical issues and underwhelming gameplay, making it worth playing after it is fixed.

Contenido: okay let begin by saying that i did not have any hype for cyberpunk 2077 when it launched i didnt start hearing about it until all the keanu reeves city to burn memes started popping up and an r301 mag into gibraltar and doing six damage because noregs and respawn entertainment servers say screw you very frustrating look ive played good games and ive played bad buggy nightmares and i can Contenido: i know im quite late to the review party and everything under the sun already been both praised and scrutinized on this game however as selfproclaimed cp2077 fanboy that rode the hype train and even built my latest gaming rig to prepare for its launch yes even scoring rtx 3080 in time i feel compelled to write out my thoughts long post ahead i originally wrote more but steam an 8000 character limit bahmy first impressions massive absolutely breathtaking the first time you step foot inside night city its simply marvel to behold sprawling concrete jungle that assaults your senses with neon signs beckoning you to spend and consume the sounds and sights are very atmospheric various districts reflect the people that work and live there for example the corporate sector everyone is mostly dressed to impress from business corpos to the lavishly lifestyled other areas are more worn down grungy swirling with smog and dust gangs transients invalids and generally povertystricken folks are more prominent here industrial sectors spit out flames from their towers autonomous machinery echoing in the distance making you wonder what cybernetic creations are being built the badlands desert area is an interesting contrast to the bustling city life barren wasteland smattered with nomad clans bloodthirsty gangs and rolling sandstorms the denizens of nc are also fairly varied in shape size and cybernetics it really feels like fully functional cyberpunk city high tech and low life the main plot is fairly interesting and the inclusion of keanu reeves as johnny silverhand was nice touch the main characters you interact with are also pretty realistic looking and are animated well the story missions are decent enough however my major gripe is with all of the side content in the way it was presented lot of them involve characters just straight up bombarding you with calls when you get near certain locations you will get spammed lot and its very jarring they became bit of chore between running around waypoints and fast travel stations it was like i was playing skyrim at times rather than cdpr title the missions really needed to be more organic in nature the playstyles in this game are varied enough that it caters to most peoples tastes you can spec into guntoting maniac like and just slaughter enemies mercilessly like the terminator you can become hacking prodigy and fry the eyeballs right out of someones head stealth it up with ninja sword whatever you want its likely there there are also 3 main lifepaths that determine your backstory but they dont affect the games story much if at all you get wide selection of weapons to use ranging from traditional guns and knives to tech weaponry that uses different perks such as autoaim some weapons like turrets can only be used if you have the right perk i would have hoped for few more kinds of weapons but for the most part these do the job well if there ever was huge variety of something in this game it would likely have to be clothing there is an overwhelming selection of wearables to choose from however as is the problem in most rpgs you will often be seeking out the items with the best stats in turn if youre relying on loot which is usually the case this means your character will look like complete freak at times sport coat shiny yellow baggy pants cowboy boots and trilby hat oh boy if you go with your fashion sense instead youll get nice looking character that will practically die when the wind blows as the game progresses youll find enough loot that it will become easier to find the look you want as well as the armor but early game its hot mess they really should have included an option that some rpgs include where you can change the appearance of something you like to the stats of another item basically adopting the look but retaining the stats theres also great selection of cars and bikes to choose from many of which you can buy and own theyre very detailed inside kudos to the art team on this and you can listen to various radio stations that said the music is fairly varied but familiar enough to relate to metal glam rock rap latino techno etc unfortunately you cant own all of the cars in the game and even worse you can not modify them either this was rumored to be one of many planned features that got cut short due to time constraints hopefully it will be available in future dlc one aspect of the game i really need to gush over is the photo mode this is by and far the new gold standard for games that include this mode there are ton of options you can use to tweak photos different filters backgrounds stickers posesi probably spent about half my time ingame with this mode and ive taken 300 screenshots i really hope that other games take note of this robust system and incorporate something similar its an absolute blast performance and stability this is where it gets rather ugly theres hiding it this game is chock full of issues even 4 months after release i know lot of people are still having issues with getting decent fps rates on this game for game thats supposed to run better frames on rtx and dlss i fail to see it im running core i9 10850k 49ghz with 32gb ram rtx 3080 with all settings maxed and yet i still cant hit 60fps at times mostly it likes to run in the 50s but sometimes dips down to the high 30slow 40s i cant even imagine how it runs on lower rigsand the bugsoh man i think the longer i played the game it got worse to the point that it almost prevented from finishing the game near the end most of them werent too bad such as visual glitches but others would get stuck on objects or just get killed instantly from doing something like hopping onto counter despite multiple delays i believe cdpr just didnt have enough time to fix anything the devs were pressured by corporate to push out the product before christmas 2020 and this was the unfortunate end result another gripe i have most of the game is all style substance theres lot to behold with the sights and the details the game oozes atmosphere but theres nothing to enjoy if you want to roleplay within it the more you play the more your heart sinks when you notice the amount of features that dont exist npcs interact with odd responses that dont even qualify as typical generic ones i cant sit on bench or stool and buy noodle bowl or whatnot hundreds of doors that say locked and cant be opened arcade games that cant be played i cant even sleep on my bed properly sleeps sideways off the side of the bed you are given world to play around in but theres sand in the sandbox for something so painstakingly well made in terms of detail it hurts to know that you cant truly be part of it final thoughts ultimately i really enjoyed the game it wasnt quite what i expected from all the hype though the amount of bugs and missing content really cut short the potential it had it could have been so much better and would have benefitted from another delay of at least 6 months to year although i have played games that were much much worse than this ill definitely play this again as i need to finish my 100 achievement run but i will wait until the game is patched up and ideally once all the dlc is released despite the many flaws it had it still was phenomenal experience i enjoyed my stay in the dystopian future that is night city cruel place where nobody wins and there are truly happy endings sometimes thats just how life is and i can appreciate good game that reflects that endless thanks to the talented dev team for their hard work i hope to see more of the cyberpunk 20xx series in the future
negative_points: ['Bugs', 'Performance issues', 'Missing features/Lack of interactivity']
summary: Despite numerous bugs and missing features, the reviewer enjoyed the game's atmosphere and visuals, but acknowledges its unfulfilled potential due to technical issues and lack of interactivity.

Contenido: night city is city of dreams and im big dreamerwake the up samurai we have game to reviewbuckle up dummies were diving into the wonder that is cdprs cyberpunk 2077 i want to start off by saying that ive been looking forward to this game since the e3 2018 trailer dropped with my excitement massively ramping up when the 48minute demo was released after seeing it i knew then and there that id enjoy the game anyways lets dive into this mess of review its bound to be hell of ride the good if you got ta kill kill if you got ta burn it all to the ground then let it burn the gameplay is solid its nothing we havent seen before but it works well enough for what it is the gunplay feels good and the perks are serviceable if somewhat bland statbased perks arent really what im looking for in an rpg but hey i cant really complain the cyberware mods however is where the fun really starts the mantis blades gorilla arms double jumps and charge jump all add up to compelling implant system that makes the game whole lot of fun to explore and enjoythere are lot of things this game does right the main thing that sold on this game apart from cdprs pedigree is the setting for as bad as it might be to live in it the dark future looks highly enticing to personally swapping out your arm for chromeplated cybernetic counterpart getting your nervous system augmented with microprocessor that can straightup rival it hell getting fullbody conversion to become tricked out borg is about as cool as it gets the game makes you asks yourself at what point do we stop being human how much chrome is too much and if youre anything like that really gets the gears in your brain turning pun intendedthe atmosphere is another one of the games strong suits walking the streets of the dark future never felt this immersing youll be able to feel the bleakness of the trashfilled streets of pacifica the gaudiness of the gated communities of westbrooks north oak subdistrict the familiarity of heywoods neighbourhoods and the freedom of openskies of the badlandsthe characters and the story are the games shining stars in my opinion rivalling games such as the last of us and red dead redemption 2 cyberpunks characters are some of the best designed written and acted ive seen yet not once in my 200 hours of playtime did i think to myself these are just pixels on screen because to these were real people this is testament to the writers actors and designers of these characters who have all done stellar job in bringing them to life for us to interact with johnny in particular brings different perspectives and takes to the table that have made reconsider situations that i might not have otherwise his boastful attitude and witty remarks add wonderful flavour to each encounter shows up in which is godsend because if had been anything but that would quickly become unbearable the story plenty of buttclenching serious lighthearted and funny moments as well as heartwrenching and downright disturbing moments in certain characters questline youll know it when you see iti wont talk about the graphics much because personally due to the age of my system i was only able to get playable framerate with lowmedium graphics even so the game looks good if i had rig which could support raytracing and all the bells and whistles it wouldve improved my experience but as it stands now i cant complainthe soundtrack oh lord the soundtrack it is physically impossible for not to sing huehue the praises of this games score and soundtrack speeding down the highway with the radio blasting metal on full volume the cellos of johnnys rebel path theme and the different combat themes of each district all add up to very pleasant auditory experience ive been checking spotify each day since the games release to see if my favourite tracks have been added so i can listen to them whenever im out and about hell im listening to the score as im writing this reviewbut of course it cant be all sunshine and rainbows lets talk about some aspects that arent as savoury the bad test of persons true value death facing it staring it down you cant deny that cdpr failed to deliver on some aspects of the game the cut subway system which was displayed in the games very first trailer as well as promotional images removed features such as the mantis blade wallclimbing being able to sit on benches and such i understand that some sacrifices must be made for the whole game to be better but still dangling carrot in front of our eyes through trailers and gameplay showcases then taking it away on the hushhush isnt cool then theres the deceitful marketing and the whole console while being outraged that 7 year console cant run game that was clearly intended for nextgen systems is incredibly stupid to theres denying that cdpr could have informed customers of the issues that plague the base consoles in order for them to either make more informed decision when it comes to buying the game or cancelling their preorders if they already paidi believe the management and the suits at the very top have over the hardworking devs who have poured their hearts and souls into this game and it really shows its honestly outrageous to see the devs taking flak for decisions they themselves had say in regardless it is what it is the past cant be changed now lets move on the stuff that everyones been laughing about the ugly youre starting to remind of fifty years back minus the charisma and impressive bugs we all know about the bugs by now genitals popping out through clothing npcs acting like absolute tools naked tposing on bikes cars blowing up for reason the whole lot in my experience most of the bugs were simple visual issues that didnt impact my experience much apart from taking out of the moment and at times making laugh my off that being said i encountered few gamebreaking bugs during my 200 hours which frustrated the hell out of thankfully these were kept to minimum dying for reason when falling 3 feet getting permanently stuck after being hit by an npc in car falling on slanted surfaces which would put you in an animation loop that would slowly damage you until you die the performance at launch was quite bad to get through but it massively improved ever since my i54590 and gtx 1070 struggled lot when the game first came out but with patch 106 at the time of this review the performance greatly improved and the game is already in much better state even on comparatively old system like mine i dont doubt for one second that the game will be much more enjoyable after 34 months from release it wont be bugfree sure but it will definitely be in better state than what it was at launch so far in my 200 hours the game only crashed once though your experience may vary depending on your system closing thoughts thing of beauty i know will never fade away it makes sad that not all people have enjoyed this game as much as i have flaws and all sure its nothing spectacular or lifechanging as some people thought this game would be but if you honestly thought this game would blow your mind youre really shooting yourself in the foot in time after vast majority of the bugs have been fixed and all the dlcs have come out i have doubt that this game will be as wellregarded by the people who have played it as the witcher 3 if not more so i for one cant wait for that day to come take care chooms
negative_points: ['Cut content', 'Deceptive marketing', 'Bugs']
summary: Cyberpunk 2077 is a flawed but ultimately enjoyable game with a great story, characters, and atmosphere, but is held back by bugs and cut content.

Contenido: this was probably my first preorder i felt that if the game turned out to be the worst game i played or didnt even run 10 dollars i paid for the witcher 2 and the witcher 3 felt so much like stealing that the extra 60 would still not cover the amount i would pay for the enjoyment i got from themafter putting 160 hours on cyberpunk 2077 i can say that it fully deserves the full price i paid for it on its own merits and after so many disappointments in the recent aaa releases that i had this is the highest praise that i can give to this game ill start by saying that i love urban spaces i love finding alleyways that i have never seen before in my real life neighbourhood i love seeing all those lit up windows at night and i love that there are so many details and slices of life in every corner in city city to is the greatest work the humanity can achieve due to its intricacy its organic nature and how it reflects the human condition since the liberty city of gta iv most games have been disappointment in this regard for example skyrims cities consisted of 20 npcs and copy pasted guards santos of gta v was just sanitary and small theme park that just could not function as city if it was translated into real life and san francisco of watch_dogs 2 was utterly devoid of character and charm previous game of cd projekt red the witcher 3 came close to what i expect from digital urban space novigrad and to some extent toussaint were brimming with life and had all the details that real urban space might have but failed in sizethe real protagonist of the marketing campaign for this game was the city itself especially in night city wire episodes v and his or her story was in the background and rightly so because this game even with its minor issues been the greatest city that ever been built in game every district even every alleyway so many details that i was amazed that my gtx 1070 could even run it at stable fps rate too by the way there is never seen before verticality in night city when gta iv came out i was impressed how many buildings there were that you could enter but most of them were just copy paste jobs with real character to them in 12 years that passed since its release i had expected that this would be polished and taken further but this did not happen until now night city on the other hand does not only offer tons of welldesigned buildings that you can enter but completely opens up new appreciation for the city once you get the leg cyberware that allows you to double or power jump you probably should get one of those early you can probably spend hours parkouring around buildings while focusing on every little detail that been lovingly crafted and placed even some streets have multiple levels and while this is common occurrence in real cities i never noticed their absence in digital urban spaces until i visited night city not only verticality distinguishes night city from others at 160 hours i know that there are probably hundreds of alleyways and tens of shopsbarsbuildings that i never visited and even though i have completed the game at this point i look forward to going back to the game and dissect every little detail in those and the small stories they tell especially whoever designed the graffiti around the city deserves raise as i often found myself looking at those admiringly wishing that the city i live in had some of thosegameplay wise i was not expecting much just witcher in 2077 and this would have satisfied but the game we got is beautiful lovechild of the witcher and deus ex every minor quest offers multiple paths you can take if you have the necessary skill level on body or technical ability and i had fun exploring every one of them that i could have found but i can not deny that this level of freedom sometimes makes the game too easy and if you can not go through some path you can always find alternatives that allows you to skip most of the level and reach the objective quicklygames difficulty level i played on hard is not helped by the fact that there are so many perks you can obtain to transform yourself into demigod that one shots the opponent most of the time i was doing 400k damage with my sniper rifle at the end of the game but enemies can often one shot you as well if you are playing on hard or very hard if you are an experienced player i absolutely recommend picking one of those two difficulty levels there is good amount of weapon variety and unique reload and equip animations and they make you feel like the most badass merc in the city you can also use different hacks to keep your hands relatively clean but i wont spoil this part as i loved seeing how those most of those hacks worked for the first timestory and the characters are amazing i did not think that i would enjoy this game as much as i did enjoy the witcher games as i am annoyed by the rampant individualism of the modern world and most of the themes of the cyberpunk genre hit too close to home but they found good balance between the dissolving sense of community and aforementioned rampant individualism i did not expect that the so many of the character side quests would dabble on the same issue that been driving mad and this theme was executed perfectly without stepping on too many tropes of the modern storywriting for these side quests i feel that the only thing is missing is proper closure or change that impact the world but it is also possible to consider this as deliberate choice as v is just passing merc and not the main character one of the most groundbreaking parts of cyberpunk 2077 is that usually you feel like companion in other peoples main quests and this is extremely refreshing to see game where the world does not revolve around player character i feel like this should have been fleshed out more with stalker like system where every gangcommunity its explicit objectives and the player can see and impact this dynamic struggle for power or survival but maybe this is expecting too much from game that already achieves so muchthe main story is more related to traditional cyberpunk genre themes especially transhumanism libertarian erosion of the state or in better terms absolute corporate dictatorship and artificial intelligence but how they are presented elevates cyberpunk 2077 from another example of the genre to unique experience compared to newer deus ex games where these themes are so on the nose that these issues become mundane everyday thing cyberpunk 2077 with the inclusion of johnny silverhand approaches these themes with so much clarity and simplicity that you never feel the necessity to take breather to adjust your suspension of disbelief you may feel like the main story should have been longer and i thought of the same from time to time but at least there is cohesive story that will force an expulsion of feelings catharsis at numerous points of the story first person point of view and plethora of facial expressions that the characters employ greatly contributes to this as v been much more of relatable character than the most due to povanother innovation that i believe will pass under the radar is how i never felt the obligation to be mr goody two shoes during the game and could usually transfer my personal beliefs and judgement into the story without being punished by it which is so rare in most games you will often be punished by locking you out of content or forcing you to get worse ending if you are not some form of stoic angel but cyberpunk 2077 does not have this problemplease see comments for the rest of my review as i have exhausted the space given to by steam sounds bugs and final conclusion are in the comments

Contenido: i finished the witcher 3 for the first time this year and because of the interesting story told i got invested and started reading about the lore and some of the books despite this i wasnt as excited for cdprs new project as i wouldve been for something like the witcher 4 dont get wrong i was definitely hyped for this game cause i consider the witcher 3 as one of the best games i ever played and cyberpunk 2077 was being made by the same people 1 week before the game released i started to get hyped for it excited to dive into new world created by cdpr did it live up to the general hype the game had prior to its release if youve been on the internet at any point after this games release you know the answer to itbut since this is steam review i will only be talking about the pc versionto share some details about my first playthrough i chose the street kid lifepath and played as female v with this i come to the probably biggest disappointment the lifepaths were supposed to give you more than just unique dialogue options throughout the game they were supposed to give you unique prologue and change the way people in the world perceive and interact with you to some degree the nomad outsider was supposed to have harder time with befriending residents of night city and the other way around for the street kid in the end it sadly boils down to the unique dialogue options throughout the game and unique opening to the game that lasts total of maybe 15 minutes before all the paths end up at the same 6 month timeskip i real disappointment and wasted opportunity that i can only see getting improved with the planned dlc and not the free updates going from the disappointing lifepath system i wan na take moment to talk about the overall plot in short if someone would ask if the story was worth experiencing i would say yes i havent been this interested into game and its characters since rdr2 in 2018 for this games story is right up there with rdr2 and tlou in terms of writing and engagementthe long version and rough plot summary of the prologue to get you interested you play as v despite whatever lifepath you chose at the start mercenary and resident of night city you and your best pal jackie get job to steal relic from the biggest corporation in night city arasaka successfully pulling of this job will give you lot of eddies and street cred on top of that it is overlooked by one of the biggest fixers in all of night city dexter deshawn so you go and try to steal the relic but something goes horribly wrong you are framed with killing the emperor of arasaka as if that isnt bad enough the relic got damaged and the only way to preserve it and get anything out of this job is to slot it into one of your neuroports jackie dies on the way to dexter from fatal bullet wound and to save his own skin dexter disposes of any evidence of him having anything to do with this in other words shoots you in the head killing you this is rough summary of the prologue and if it interests you i can only recommend playing it for yourself and experiencing it for yourself it is heartbreaking story with endings either being very depressive or hopeful but not true happy ending after talking about the story lets move to the one thing standing in cyberpunks way from immersing you into its incredibly world and story the bugs they are present they are unavoidable and they will throw you out of the immersion but while there are lot of people complaining about them as i am writing this review 23122020 please keep in mind that the witcher 3 experienced similiar issues in its early life i am positive that cdpr will be able to iron out these issues and turn this game into polished product in the near future i alsowant to mention that in my 70h at the time of writing this review i have yet to crash once my game softlocked maybe once and it was resolved with reloading previous save your experience may vary since i have seen couple friends having more or less issues than myself now that i have talked about the bugs i want to talk about my favourite part of this game seperate from its story i want to point out the characters cyberpunk manages to have some of the most alive feeling characters in any game i have ever played matter if it is character that is actively part of the main plot like johnny silverhand or someone that you can completely miss like river ward they managed to make every character feel like they have their own ambitions and reasons for acting the way they are one of my favourite moments in the 70h i spend with this game was talking to convicted murderer that got bailed from death row due to turning into man of god but if agrees gets crucified for an exotic braindance most of these characters get introduced in unexpected ways that make every side quest in the game seem important i am by means someone who completes everything in game but cyberpunk managed to make finish almost every side quest i was able to find and v themselves is contestant for one of the greatest protagonists in recent memory its time to mention night city and its less impactful residents night city itself is incredibly detailed and dense there are small things to see and discover around every corner and visual story telling is strong theme the city feels like its always moving but the residents themselves are keeping this from being one of the most immersive worlds ever crafted they way npcs and cars seem to work is that they only really exist around v which is normal way to save some resources but if you drive fast on long straight road you can see cars in the distance dissapear breaking the immersion it is totally possible to turn night city into ghost town if you enter the city at high speeds this can be fixed with quicksaving and reloading your save general npc ai is barely present with them having 2 modes the first one is walking around the other one is cowering in fear running away defending themselves or calling the authorities throwing you out of the car you just stole from them nothing on top of that the police system is horrible you accidentally run someone over and the ncpd will start spawning behind you while i am of the opinion that this isnt as big of deal as people make it out to be due to the game never requiring you to mess with the police it is still sad that they werent able to provide system akin to gtas to provide fun chases and firefights outside of gigs story or side missions cdpr mentioned something about them seeing this as bug so they might fix the ai they in fact already improved it tiny bit at the time of writing this but i am not entirely convinced this is something they will be able to completely overhaulas the last thing i wan na take brief moment to talk about the rpg mechanics and the soundtrack there are total of 5 skills with sub trees in them there is lot of room for experimentation and you can definitely feel the difference between builds i dont believe you can skill in way to make the game unbeatable focusing on something like body will open up lot of doors for you but something like cool will give you more dialogue options maybe even increasing your rewards for missions making second or third playthrough feel different from the previous ones every playthrough is accompanied by great soundtrack worth mentioning here is never fade away for hitting very hard matter which ending you get i would love to write more about the mechanics and plot of the game but the steam character limiti love this game despite its flaws would recommend to friend and i am excited for the dlcthx for reading this if you did

Contenido: so here it is cyberpunk 2077 is out after its announcement that is almost 8 years agobut is it worth it should you buy it i will give you brief summary on what i gathered in my first 11h of game experienceno spoilers will be included in this reviewgraphicsfor those asking im playing with 2070 super oc intel i79700k 45ghz 32gb ddr4 3000mhz on 1440p 144hz monitor without any problems on highest setting with raytracing off and some filters off film grain and motion blur the game runs at most times on perfect 80fps but drops down to 60 in some placeswhile sometimes the graphics feel sometimes bit blurry while driving in open world at day at night it looks fantastic if there is one thing cdpr did great it is the atmosphere of night city which really feels like dystopian future of its genre sometimes i even got blade runner vibes one thing i must say is though on how damn beautiful the faces are of characters that you must interact with or which you are allowd to interact i really loved staring into the face of jackie judy or other characters since they looks sooo realistic and pleasent to look at the wrinkles their facial expressions this is the magnus opum of face graphics and im not joking if just every npc would have it yes the faces of random npcs arent that good and it looks like only the ones you should and could interact with have been deliberately worked on to look that good which is understandable to be honest overall game looks great the city damn great atmosphere and the faces of only the main characters look fantastic turn raytracing off though since its probably to hard on your gpu if you dont have 3070 or highergameplayoh god here we goi really must say the game is buggy i didnt have anything gamebreaking yet but i had many buggs that made tragic scenes funny as hell and other things that were so absurd that it feels like im playing bethesda game cigarettes or cigars are floating in the face of characters or npcs while smoking themnpcs spawning or going through objects which shouldnt happenobjects as glasses and trash explodingcars getting stuck in objects or spawning in themobjects that are switched graphicaly to other objects like you equipped gun but have noodle box in your handi would have listed much more since it should be bug but those things i will mention now arent even bugs to begin with in my opinionpolice spawning right behind you after commiting crimecars dont react to obstacles and dont even evade themnpcs are crouching and many times not even running away when shooting at them or near themsorry but game like gta3 even somehow could do police chase in their cars while in cb 2077 they would not bother and just spawn behind you so you get killed as fast as possible im really pissed about those points mentioned above that are not bugs but just badly programmed npcs i cant even call that aione thing i really dont understand though are customability of your character cdpr promised sooo much out of it on how much you can change and stuff and im not talking about the penis though even i thought you can customize it more you cant change your hair after it since there is barber shop in that game like how come you can buy dildos while there is barber in this game are you guys nuts this is one of the most essential side things you want in an open world game it makes even less sense since there are barbers in witcher 3 so warning to those making their character it is final so choose wisely as you cant change many cosmetic features of you characterthe driving is uhhh horrible with cars and acceptable with bikes but somehow i must say that this is tradition in many games with many studios looking back at gta4 watch dogs and more i can look over itthe fight abilities are good sometimes it doesnt feel good tho play with particular gun sometimes it does i think its really subjective to the player to what and which gun feels great to shoot with and so onstory and sidequesteven though i have almost 11h i didnt come to play some sidequests i will update this review though after finishing this game which will take while the story to this point is interesting and gripping which is one of the reasons i still feel enjoyment in playing this gameconclusionthe game is in my opinion not ready they should have postponed it for atleast another year to fix many of those unnerving bugs adding more options and promised functions and adding an ai for the cars and police chasesoverall the world looks great the graphics are also nice and i still have fun to play itso should you buy it if you like the genre why not should you buy it nowabsoluetly notwhen should i buy it after some months best you check the state of the game after 2 months and think about itcan i recommend itnot in this state it is unfinished game which should have taken more timewhy do you still keep playing it and didnt return itwell i got it as present and i still enjoy its atmosphere and its story till now but that could changeseriously wait till some months have passed and more hotfixes and content is added that was promised from the beginning cdpr made to many ambitious statements while biting itself in the arse making this gamethe hype and the pressure to release the game as fast as possible after finishing the last witcher 3 installement blood and wine made the game to what it is now they should have followed their own statement with coming when its ready and should have withstanded the pressure of releasing it sure open world games are not easy to make and there will be always some funny bugs in it look at gta bethesda games and so on but there is sooo much missing and so many problems that shouldnt be in final product which makes kinda dissapointed coming from the so called best customer friendly developerbut as we know cdpr they surely will fix it but it will cost time so wait some months and check the state of the game then i will update this review after finishing this game which could take some time i will address future hotfixes and additions to the game and also tell you about the story till then see you

summary: Cyberpunk 2077 is not ready for release due to numerous bugs, AI issues and missing features, but the atmosphere and story are enjoyable and it's recommended to wait for future fixes and content updates before buying.

Contenido: i will preface this review by saying that i have just altf4ed out of the game in rage at quest that i am clearly not ready to do and despite the spew of negativity that you are about to read there is something about this game that is fun there is some intangible aspect to this game that i am having fun with however i am beyond comfortable saying that this game was not ready for market and is not worth 60 in its current statei can honestly say this is an unfinished game ill preface this with few things firstly is an admission that im terrible at shooters so when i say the shooting is stiff and unrewarding take it with grain of salt the next three are all reviews number 54100 would i recommend anyone buy this game i wouldnt and finally am i enjoying myself barelyokay so lets begin for anyone actually reading this chief complaint and honestly what sunk the entire experience for the hell nightmare cluster trench foot bastard that is the driving i cant express the level of unfun and genuine repeller from the game the driving here is im playing on mouse and keyboard and ive often in my long 6 hours with this game expressed that the driving is akin to piloting an elephant on ice skates matter how little of how much i use the or d key the rear of my car swings out like drift and starts my car fishtailing away as i try desperately to maintain control the driving here is some of the worst ive ever experienced the cars also wont auto path to objectives if placed on the route to them ironically making this driving technology regression from the witchers horses in 2015 by the same developernext is the bizarre and frustrating fact that your character customization options quite literally end at the creation screen the second that you press done on your creation window you are locked into stone there are nail salons barbershops tattoo parlors and none of the body mods that were promised the game throws you out into the world as permanent and unchanging entity further the tattoo options are limited to 5 or 6 presets for the face and body each if you like some of tattoo set but not all then tough luck you take it all or none and can never change it later hair color is bizarre as well as far as i can tell there is option to have brown hair color only amber or black yet vs beard can be set to normal brown meaning that the color pallet exists in the gameas said in my opener the shooting feels stiff and the aiming feels wrong couple this with the fact that despite going all in on body build and attempting to lower difficulty to normal when hitting brick walls the melee combat seems to be wholly unviable enemies at equal or higher level simply maul v if you fight in any way other than slow covertocover peak and shoot style the perks that v can take on level up are also lame they dont have any cool or noticeable impact on the way that combat flows or plays they just make simple and minor number changes and fail to add any fun or diversity to the combatspotty voice acting seems to plague missions even main story ones on the very first mission where youre sent to steal car you meet the cars owner and the voice acting sounds like child doing voice over for covid science project there are numerous other times that ive been jarred out of cutscene by awful voice acting but that one stuck out to the most of allpast here are spoilers for what limited story ive played be ye warned man could the writing surrounding the death of jackie have been any worse seriously what joke that was despite cdpr spoiling this moment for themselves in the 1st mission playthrough that they released back in early 2020 lets look at all the mash level corny self spoiling that happens leading up to this1 before you go into the afterlife to meet dex jackie says that always feels like hes lying to his mom when says everything is okay and that always feels deeper in the more you do 2 right after entering the afterlife yes the sound you just heard was in fact cdpr hitting you over the head with the analogy and not just the wind jackie orders the drink of one of their legends and v can ask how you get drink named after you the answer die in an epic way and literally right after this jackie the bartender write down his drink recipe so they can name drink after him3 on the way to the hotel for the heist v can remind jackie to keep his head in the game to which jackie will reply that worked his whole life to get out of this city and after this say it with 70s cop show fans one last job hes never going back to broke4 when you enter the hotel jackie will walk up to the bar entrance turn to v and say that after this one more time everyone one last job hed like to come back to this nice hotel with his money and his retirement and have fun with misty his girl back homethis kind of stuff is everywhere the twists so far have been telegraphed the writing been either painfully convoluted or painfully obvious the entirety of what is happening to with johnny feels jarring unearned and warped my play through by making feel entirely disconnected from the story i am post chapter two acutely aware of the fact that im playing video game and unlike in games like saints row and gta that is not good thing for cyberpunkas said to begin this game is not done it should not have been released and you should not buy it for at least 6 months to year post this review being written i trust cdpr i loved the witcher 3 and place is as my favorite game of all time its why i went out on limb and broke personal rule to never get games on release given time cdpr will patch this game to point that it is worth the price tag and probably release dlc to truly make night city place worth being explored until that time however keep the 60

Contenido: oh well admittedly its difficult for to write this review let start by saying that i was and kind of still am pretty biased regarding cdpr and their games and thats why its painful to admit and accept the fact that in its current state cp 2077 is very dissapointing by cdpr standards and in general as wellim huge fantasy and rpg fan and with the witcher trilogy cdpr created one of my favorite gaming franchises i loved all 3 witcher games thronebreaker played gwent on gog for dozens of hours and all of them are entertaining quality content rich titles so my personal experiences with their previous products the countless hours i invested in them and the enjoyment i got out of them pretty much made cdpr my favorite developer studio and they even topped it with their attitude towards their community and the continous support they provide to their games patches and fixes years after release free dlcs paid expansions with incredible amount of contentas lot of other gamers i highly anticipated cp 2077 i had pretty solid idea what to expect i was familiar with previous cdpr titles and i knew it will be heavily text and dialogue based rpg and did not expect fastpaced futuristic fps gta or whatever so im not one of those who compare it to gta v screen by screen neither i complain about the amount of dialogues or the slowburning storyfurthermore i consciously didnt sit on the hypetrain like lot of dumbasses i didnt expect this game to be some kind of miracle that would bring groundbreaking neverbeforeseen innovations in its every aspect and would revolutionize the gaming industry forever i remembered the buggy state in which the witcher 3 was released so i expected to encounter bugs as well my point is that i had pretty high but not unrealistic hopes and expectations for cyberpunk 2077i knew it wouldnt be able to live to the unbelievable hype that was generated around it but cdpr can only be partly blamed for that the unrealistic hype was mostly generated by gaming portals and journalists i do not wish to go into detail about the state of todays gaming journalism and the quality it represents because its ridiculous and pathetic beyond measure and the highly toxic gaming community itself id love to address this as well and share my opinion but i could rant on and on about this for hours but lets just say that its just sad that in 2020 its common that developers receive deaththreaths over the delay of videogame by some basementdweller pathetic nerd get life dudeso lets talk about the gameso far i have played for around 60 hours and i still havent finished the story but i usually take my time in rpgs and complete every sidequest explore everything that i can etc so thats normal i guess its true that you can rush through the story under 1520 hours but who in their right minds would do that in any rpg initially i didnt encounter that many bugs only few barely noticable graphical glitches but nothing gamebreaking the game only crashed once over the span of 60 hours and i had pretty stable performance and smooth experience with my rtx 2080 but bugs became more frequent and severe as i played more besides the mentioned graphical glitches ive seen wierd animations missing textures cars disappearing and popping out of nowhere cars falling from the sky quests that can not be finished unlootable items and so onthe hotfixes didnt bring that much improvement at least regarding those bugs that i experienced but based on the state the witcher 3 was released and the one it is in now im sure all of these will be resolved with the upcoming patches in the next monthsthe graphics are pretty solid with max settings the city looks great the characters sometimes are less so but its appealing to look at its nothing jawdropping and thats totally fine by its very sad when someone thinks that good graphics good game i definitely love the atmosphere of the game the hightech lowlife futuristic cyberpunk setting is great you can feel the strong bladerunner influence and the great music and soundtrack complements the atmosphere very wellmoving on to the story as i said i havent finished it yet so i cant form an opinion about it in its entirety buts its kind of letdown so far its not the worst i wouldnt even say its bad sadly its just not that interesting to make want to get to the end of it and it doesnt help that that the first 1015 main quests and the story they cover have been spoiled by the trailers before release some of the sidequests are more interesting than the main story but the other gigs and jobs become just dull and repetitive quicklymy main problem is that cyberpunk 2077 lacks lot of mechanics that in my opinion would be must in such worldsetting character customization is not that bad as some say there are plenty of options but i have to agree that i have seen far more detailed customization possibilites in other games ok you can choose the color of your teeth the size and shape of your but whats the purpose you cant even see your character outside of the inventory screen not even during sex sequencesin world where body modification is not just possible but pretty much common thing with cyberware implants etc and where looks in general are above all else the fact that you cant alter your appearance later on during the game is just pathetic you cant even get haircut which is pretty much inexcusable nowadays especially that even the witcher 3 offered such possibilitessince cyberpunk 2077 is an rpg your clothes and equipment obv provide stat boosts if you want to use items that provide better stats you constantly have to change them and because of that most of the time your appearance is ridiculous and you look like homeless who dresses from lost and found bin why isnt there an option to change the looks of your clothes while keeping the new stats lot of other games utilize such functionality transmogrification and even tough this is not fantasy rpg changing the appearance of clothes can be easily explained in scifi setting as well for example with some kind of holographic technology or whateveranother big problem is that sadly there is not much to do in night city there are plenty of sidequests which are fine you have tons of gigs and other sidejobs but these jobs are almost identical apprehend or kill cyberpsycho kill some gang members here and there retrieve some intel from somewhere etc and they become repetitive very quickly and besides this there is nothing there are few collectibles you can buy cars and motorcycles there few races and underground fighting pits or something like that and with that we are at the end of the listonce again id like to mention that i know this is not sandbox action game its an openworld rpg i dont want to play pool or bowling or things like that like some peep mentioned comparing it to gta v but in 2020 i expected more it was emphasized that sex and sexual themes are very important well besides some romance options during sidequests there is 1 female and 1 male prostitue in night city on the same street you can bang them and thats it you cant even go to strip clubs or anything like thatjust to mention the driving i dont think its as bad as some say i didnt really have any problems with the controls or mechanics besides that the first person view is useless d but then again im not really into driving games and driving mechanics are just do not matter to in generali expected solid rpg but at the moment cp2077 feels unfinished rushed buggy and just very average which is nowhere near the usual cdpr quality and sadly i cant recommend it you should wait at least 1 year or half and check back then

Contenido: first off i didnt watch any of the preview trailers i didnt know what was going on with cyberpunk i had assumed cdpr dumpstered it when i heard it droppedmy curiousity got the best of this is your last warning to avoid any spoilersits been yeara few patches laterand 25 playthroughs and i can review itnoi dont reccomend it why dont i reccomend it theres so many reasons why i dont but lets start off the good stuffthe city looks great the music is killer the concept is cool the characters you interact with are generally interesting in some wayfixers aside and thats about where my praise stops youll see praise about the graphics and storyyoull see people sing praise about how cdpr fixed problems and will keep fixing problemsabout how we got some dlcsand none of that matters not one bit of it the core problems of the game are not fixed theres issues with the game that go down to the foundation and spit polishing the rest of the decrepit structure doesnt solve the foundations collapse lets start off with the story life paths generally mean nothing in the grand scheme of things it changes your first hour or soand it changes how you can interact with certain charactersbut beyond thatit matters not life paths werent expanded on by cdpr so i wont go further into themthe story pacing is all kinds of justbad the life path is 15m to an hour depending on if you actually want it to drag on longer then begins act 1 act 1 is just terribly paced the montage is gameplay we shouldve gottento build up with jackie the game wants us to care about jackieand triesbut it falls flat on its face during act 1 you meet lot of interesting characterstalk lotand plan the biggest heist in the city its all cool and payday like in some ways but theres crackssmall onesthat start to show here you get introduced to all these peopleand are given so little reason to care about them or their problems act 2 suffers more of the samebut we get johnny johnnys actually pretty cool guy in my opinion i was always mostly entertained by his appearencesand quips in conversations or hearing is input on whats going on sure hes disembodied voice in my headbut at least hes funny at times act 2 picks up where act 1 endsyou have hole in the headand youre dying because johnnys eating your brain meat theres high points in act 2 the vas did great work here trying to convey emotion and the troubling times vikvand other characters do amazing work here act 3 is figuring out what to doand exploring johnny and the end game and the 3 paths you have laid out in front of you help with that final choice seeing johnny change from hardcore anti corpo jerkoff to becoming more mellow after sees the damage hes done to vand others around themalong with how the world didnt changewakes him up its an interesting change of character and shows that johnny could grow its shame that v didnt really grow as much as i hoped would the endings are all well doneand all interesting in their own ways depending on what you choose to do i wont spoil thembut i did quite like them but the stories alrightits got pacing issues for the first half of the game the side gigs are where the good writing really shows through theres lot of very good onesand lot of very enjoyable ones that i quite enjoyed beyond the pacing problems i didnt have an issue with the story for the most parti just wish that the writers took more into account of if v was his own character or the player it feels like at times they forgotso the stories passable the voice acting is very well doneso why am i thumbing it downmechanicallythe game isnt fun thats my biggest problem with the game mechanicallyits not fun at all its boring slog while yesyou can do crazy buildsthose crazy builds dont mean whole lot when you realize that the perks are all almost all passive bonuses like added damage or higher crit chance the game uses terrible looter shooter systemand theres just not enough gear to justify it some weapons have plenty of time in the limelightothers not so much the armor system is cancer and you look like you went dumpster diving in the trash wall outside the city most of the gear you find will be broken down into parts to upgrade the gear you actually like most of the gear wont ever be touched because it conflicts too much with your build the builds just arent fun nor are they intuitive most of the perks are passive perks that increase critical damage or critcal changeor outright damage most of the perks you want for build will end up conflicting with other things you want in build but once you realize that all builds pale in comparison to the sneaky hackerman revovler build that clears entire compounds in seconds with spreading quickhacksyou learn that most build crafting is utterly pointless you dont even have to spec into hacking to get the most benefits from solid cyberdeckcyberware feels largely bad once you learn that the technomancer hackerbuild is the best build in the gameand you grind to get yourself to that pointthe game is boring the rocket arm is more likely to kill you than the enemythe monowire uses almost all the same perks that gorilla arms wantsand mantis blades so few animations that it gets boring to use very quickly once you get the hover jump cyberware your mobility needs are met and you only need to spec the rest to your build but like perksso much of its passive perks that you forget you have themmore rammore damage to bots and mechsetcyou also cant sell certain cyberwares so its pointless to buy lower grade try it out then trade it in laterthe economy is so out of wack for everything you make and sellis worthlesseverything you buy is tens of thousands of eddiesyes im aware you can get perk that increases the value of an item that you craft but tell meif i make legendary weaponand sell itwhy is it 2900but to buy it i have to tack on another 40k cars are largely pointless you get so many vehicles for freeyou only need to buy at minimum oneand even then thats debatable get bike if you really have eddies to burn you get the fasest car for freea very good bike for freeand free truckso why waste eddies on any other cars or bikesits mediocre its not very good and its shamebecause theres elements of good game under here i want to like itbut the first act is so boring that i hate doing it again
positive_highlights: ['City looks great', 'Music is killer', 'Concept is cool']
negative_points: ['Story pacing issues', 'Mechanically not fun', 'Terrible looter shooter system']
