Contenido: ive been playing this game to death the past few days and im really not sure if im going to go back to it cyberpunk 2077 tries to do lot but fails to do anything particularly well so im going to just breakdown different aspects and features of the game driving vehicles ill start off with mostly positive here i think the driving is pretty good i just think the main issue is the other cars on the road any time you crash into car theres good chance youll get stuck in it cars randomly swerve in front of you people seem to do this as well and the ai is nonexistent the game is best played with motorcycle as you can drive straight through traffic and it feels really nice there is absolutely reason to use anything other than motorcycle in this gamevehicles are not customizable at all and you buy them by tracking the quest in the journal menu which feels like the wrong way to do that it just felt wrong considering it only gave you 1 task which was buy x vehicle this to felt like they needed to use one of their existing systems to let players acquire vehicles and didnt want to put the time into vehicle shop of some kind which is disappointing it just doesnt fit in that menu at all stealth the stealth is by far the worst ive ever seen in any game the enemies either have eagle eyes and see you from miles away instantly or they are blind as bat and see absolutely nothing the walking patterns of the enemies look extremely random sometimes and the cameras are extremely annoying as to hack anything you need to look at it in direct sight which puts you in danger of being caughtnot to mention that when an enemy does find you they instantly alert every other enemy on the map and know exactly where you are it wouldve been way more fun if you had few seconds to fix your mistake forcing you into danger and out in the open to kill the enemy combat the combat is ok at best its nothing special enemies have such janky animations and move so randomly that youll miss 90 of your headshots with the sniper rifle and 98 of the game is shooting the same human models with different clothes and mostly the same weapons the robots rarely show up at all and act as bigger version of humans that sponge bullets rather than having unique features this is what i wanted from humans more unique abilities you have world of cybernetics and the best you can do is someone who moves towards you really fastgrenades feel useless as most enemies are never grouped together and run from place to place constantly the emp was somewhat useful although there were many times where it didnt do anything at allstorythe story felt like the highlight of the whole game but even that collapsed at the end spoilers here but i honestly felt like it was rushed at the end i did not see it coming it feels like youre at the peak and then theres one last quest and it ends quite abruptly i did 3 different endings and each time the credits rolled i did not expect it it just felt emptythe first 4 hours of the story are honestly magicalweapons items clothingim not sure how i want to critique the food items but i did not use them for the entirety of the story they just feel so hard to find and useless at the same time i have so much and thats real shame considering how much of it is all over the placea huge majority of the weapons are exactly the same it started to feel pointless to even loot enemies for weapons as i knew they would just be pretty much the same weapon there was little to variety for most of the gameas for cybernetics there really arent that many and their abilities are quite boring you get the real good ones like the double jump which as you can expect is very glitchy and hardly works then the rest are just stat increases that just arent funthe health items have almost identical icons and names and they really expect you to know the difference and strategically use them people are midcombat chances are they are just going to press x and see what happens clothing is irritating as you either choose looks or stats and go with whatever as nothing really goes together visually since i was prioritizing best stats my character at the end of the game was wearing bright yellow jacket bright blue trousers with red parts in it customizing your look was mentioned quite heavily in the gameplay trailer so the fact that you need to sacrifice serious gameplay advantages to have decent looking character is quite let downgraphicsthis is hard for to judge as there were times where the game looked spectacular and blew my mind then there were times where it looked absolutely terrible i choke the latter up to the character models and visual glitches ruining everything i think that the game could recover from this issue with patches to the gameenemy hideoutsearly in the game the most fun i had was going to all the enemy hideouts and killing them all for quick money and good loot i ended up doing these quite heavily in the middle of the game so after i finished the main story i went back to try the high and very high difficulty ones and was very disappointed first of all the enemies are scaled in difficulty almost entirely by increasing their health and damage to ridiculous proportions to the point where it just feels extremely unfair some of them i was getting instakilled by sniper rifle and you cant even stealth because the enemy breaks out the game is basically just saying you cant do these i feel as though they should have been possible if you played smart but instead they shut off every possible way of winning eg increasing ram amount for hacking to be too high making stealth kills impossible and as i said increasing health and damage to high amountsmovementi cant believe the movement is this hurrendous especially the tailing of characters i dont even know how they messed this up so badly when you follow an npc character as they are talking you will be forced to slow walk which is fine but for reason it randomly lets you sprint again at random points even when you arent pressing anything other than w and in those situations you can just sprint ahead regardlesscrouching is so incredibly slow but is still necessary to the combat so you cant just avoid doing it it breaks the pace of combat when you have to get up and down so slowlysliding is useless i have absolutely idea what purpose it serves its also very slow and you stop sliding after about 3 metres and take 2 seconds to get off the ground again it purpose in the story and combat it provides advantages eitherfunctionalityit to be said this is by far one of the buggiest games i have ever played every single one of the things i have listed so far and even things i havent glitched or bugged at some point in the game some required restarts or going back to checkpoints others were harmless but immersion breaking characters glitching through the map animations not loading cutscenes loading into the npcs camera position and being inside their head your car getting stuck in other cars motorcycles being able to ride up npcs into the air randomly standing on dynamic prop which then sends you flying 30 metres across the floor or into the air quests not loading or the digital biochip effect staying on the screen outside of cutscenes forever until you reload characters talking over each other its an absolute mess of functionality and is by far one of the worst killers of this gameit must be said that i really did enjoy the first 4 hours of this game but it suffers from the mans sky effect where the first few hours are amazing due to discovery and then you discover the reality
technical_issues: ['bugs', 'glitches', 'characters glitching through the map', 'animations not loading', 'cutscenes loading into the npcs camera position', 'car getting stuck in other cars', 'motorcycles being able to ride up npcs into the air', 'quests not loading', 'digital biochip effect staying on the screen outside of cutscenes', 'characters talking over each other']
positive_highlights: ['Driving (mostly with motorcycle)', 'First 4 hours of the story', 'Enemy hideouts early in the game']
negative_points: ['Stealth', 'Combat', 'Technical issues/bugs']
summary: Cyberpunk 2077 tries to do a lot, but fails to execute most aspects well, plagued by bugs and flawed gameplay mechanics, leading to a disappointing experience despite an initially engaging story.

Contenido: i will preface this review by saying that i have just altf4ed out of the game in rage at quest that i am clearly not ready to do and despite the spew of negativity that you are about to read there is something about this game that is fun there is some intangible aspect to this game that i am having fun with however i am beyond comfortable saying that this game was not ready for market and is not worth 60 in its current statei can honestly say this is an unfinished game ill preface this with few things firstly is an admission that im terrible at shooters so when i say the shooting is stiff and unrewarding take it with grain of salt the next three are all reviews number 54100 would i recommend anyone buy this game i wouldnt and finally am i enjoying myself barelyokay so lets begin for anyone actually reading this chief complaint and honestly what sunk the entire experience for the hell nightmare cluster trench foot bastard that is the driving i cant express the level of unfun and genuine repeller from the game the driving here is im playing on mouse and keyboard and ive often in my long 6 hours with this game expressed that the driving is akin to piloting an elephant on ice skates matter how little of how much i use the or d key the rear of my car swings out like drift and starts my car fishtailing away as i try desperately to maintain control the driving here is some of the worst ive ever experienced the cars also wont auto path to objectives if placed on the route to them ironically making this driving technology regression from the witchers horses in 2015 by the same developernext is the bizarre and frustrating fact that your character customization options quite literally end at the creation screen the second that you press done on your creation window you are locked into stone there are nail salons barbershops tattoo parlors and none of the body mods that were promised the game throws you out into the world as permanent and unchanging entity further the tattoo options are limited to 5 or 6 presets for the face and body each if you like some of tattoo set but not all then tough luck you take it all or none and can never change it later hair color is bizarre as well as far as i can tell there is option to have brown hair color only amber or black yet vs beard can be set to normal brown meaning that the color pallet exists in the gameas said in my opener the shooting feels stiff and the aiming feels wrong couple this with the fact that despite going all in on body build and attempting to lower difficulty to normal when hitting brick walls the melee combat seems to be wholly unviable enemies at equal or higher level simply maul v if you fight in any way other than slow covertocover peak and shoot style the perks that v can take on level up are also lame they dont have any cool or noticeable impact on the way that combat flows or plays they just make simple and minor number changes and fail to add any fun or diversity to the combatspotty voice acting seems to plague missions even main story ones on the very first mission where youre sent to steal car you meet the cars owner and the voice acting sounds like child doing voice over for covid science project there are numerous other times that ive been jarred out of cutscene by awful voice acting but that one stuck out to the most of allpast here are spoilers for what limited story ive played be ye warned man could the writing surrounding the death of jackie have been any worse seriously what joke that was despite cdpr spoiling this moment for themselves in the 1st mission playthrough that they released back in early 2020 lets look at all the mash level corny self spoiling that happens leading up to this1 before you go into the afterlife to meet dex jackie says that always feels like hes lying to his mom when says everything is okay and that always feels deeper in the more you do 2 right after entering the afterlife yes the sound you just heard was in fact cdpr hitting you over the head with the analogy and not just the wind jackie orders the drink of one of their legends and v can ask how you get drink named after you the answer die in an epic way and literally right after this jackie the bartender write down his drink recipe so they can name drink after him3 on the way to the hotel for the heist v can remind jackie to keep his head in the game to which jackie will reply that worked his whole life to get out of this city and after this say it with 70s cop show fans one last job hes never going back to broke4 when you enter the hotel jackie will walk up to the bar entrance turn to v and say that after this one more time everyone one last job hed like to come back to this nice hotel with his money and his retirement and have fun with misty his girl back homethis kind of stuff is everywhere the twists so far have been telegraphed the writing been either painfully convoluted or painfully obvious the entirety of what is happening to with johnny feels jarring unearned and warped my play through by making feel entirely disconnected from the story i am post chapter two acutely aware of the fact that im playing video game and unlike in games like saints row and gta that is not good thing for cyberpunkas said to begin this game is not done it should not have been released and you should not buy it for at least 6 months to year post this review being written i trust cdpr i loved the witcher 3 and place is as my favorite game of all time its why i went out on limb and broke personal rule to never get games on release given time cdpr will patch this game to point that it is worth the price tag and probably release dlc to truly make night city place worth being explored until that time however keep the 60

Contenido: what i wish cyberpunk was truly openended rpg you can create anyone and be anyone you the player can set your own ambitions and the choices you make in the game would directly reflect who youre trying to role play your life path is more apparent ingame beyond just the opening and certain dialogue the game actually branches off into different paths and your choices make difference in the beginning and middle not just the end your choices have impact that also reflects onto the world itself as you playyou get to purchase homesapartments customize them visit futuristic autoshops to customize your cars with interesting and useful gadgets or cosmetics enter coffee shop and watch as npcs go on with their lives maybe bump into unique interactions with them walk into casino and play your hand in futuristic version of poker come across different activities that you wouldnt see in the modern world different means of transportation like subways or flying cars to get vantage view of the city entering clothes shop and actually visually trying on different clothes to have the opportunity to set yourself in this world and truly immerse yourself by having the chance to do what otherwise would seem as mundane tasks but have it become interesting because of the futuristic setting this sort of detail would create an environment and bustling city with substance and one thatd be worth returning to i wouldve hoped for more dynamic level of detail where for example you would have greater chance of stealth during nighttime or youd get dirty after hours of missions while neglecting showeringresting i never had reason to enter my apartment so why not give the players reason to these little realistic details dynamics would only add to the immersion it was surprising to that that level of detail was lacking from developers like cdprid love to see droids interacting with the world and other npcs walking the streets being vendors and interesting charactersquestgivers etc there was only taste of this with the ai taxi service ingame it wouldve been neat to see more innovative uses of tech scattered throughout the world that could demonstrate the difference in everyday life compared to the present i feel the game didnt take enough advantage of its setting to better showcase futuristic city smart law enforcement system where being issued warrant actually means you have to be wary of running into police officers in certain parts of the city and have to give effort in evading the police there shouldve also been different means of dealing with the law bribes surrender resisting getting caught and imprisoned etc and those different means could be dependent on your roleplaying builds and attributes instead i feel as though i can get away with anything and short drive around the block will clear my name wheres the depth i could go on about the different features that couldve truly enhanced this game and lot of what i wished for is actually also what cdpr also promised huge chunk of these promises were far from fulfilled though what we gotan interesting and good story decent enough combatstealth but with everything else falling at or well below average fix the bugs and this review will likely still stand im more concerned by the fundamental aspects of the game if this description doesnt change my opinion will stand vs ambition is mostly their own if you arent interested in becoming legend of night city and for example you chose nomad because youd actually prefer to be an outsider well you dont have much roleplaying say remember youre not playing your own character youre role playing v that version of v still the same goal in mind matter where you come from or what youre actually interested in the only time youll be able to express the sort of direction you want to head its at the very end when you simply choose between the different endings branching storylines is nothing more than just choosing between multiple different endings you unlock more endings simply by doing few key quest lines thats it there wasnt any impactful decision up until the very end this takes any replayability away from the game just replay the last mission and you saw everything theres reason to replay anything elseyou cant pay attention to npcs too much or itll break immersion they dont have their own daily routines they walk in circles and get scared by you simply jumping onto railing law enforcement ai is especially horrible instantly spawning on you and not really posing any challenge either npcs do lot to games environment and immersiveness it would need an entire rework to fixi know the game is meant to be dystopian but that doesnt mean night city needed to be so distasteful its empty trashy and unpleasant i wouldnt want to set foot in that city in real life i personally dont think it really captures the vibe of cyberpunk either cyberpunks world isnt much of sandbox its not really the game youd start up to just to mess around in simply because there isnt really anything to do aside from the missionsgigs unlike game like gta or rdr2 where the worlds are entertaining enough on their own tw3 was good in that regard as well so why are we taking steps backwards those aforementioned worlds were filled with detail and unique interactionsencounters you were bound to run into something you havent seen before even after hours of gameplay which made those worlds worth exploring i never felt compelled to do that in cyberpunk and when i did decide to explore anyways it just reminded of the lack of substance within night city that sandboxexploration aspect to the world was just missing and to that was both surprising and disappointingmilitary and intelligent taxi droids are there but why not drones who could sweep the city for example the city could sure use it surely they wouldve have had that sort of technology in the future again it doesnt feel like the future setting was fully taken advantage of there couldve been so much to see and experience in this setting there was definitely more room to see technological advances in playthe game felt void and heavily relied on its short story to keep the interest if the story is the only thing you value this should be enough for you cdpr are good story writers i just hoped for something more and i dont think its unfair to say that as cdpr promised difference experience verdictperhaps its at cdprs disadvantage that i and many others hold them to higher standard because of their past work at the same time i do believe the developers envisioned the game i described in the first half of this review but for whatever reasons it wasnt delivered there were so many promised features lacking that it stripped the depth and detail i was expecting the game to is just another average open world game now but with story thats above that average i couldnt say the experience was unique or amazing it was just fun and good enough to finish through youre not missing out on whole experience so i wouldnt go out of my way to recommend this game i wouldnt outright discourage it either however id only suggest to wait for more patches andor sales theres need to rush i wouldve likely given this game neutral rating if steam had that option otherwise i would only truly recommend the game that cdpr promisedin short if you told you havent played cyberpunk 2077 i wouldnt react with what you havent played cyberpunk i wish that wasnt the case
negative_points: ['lack of open world activities', 'shallow NPC interactions', 'uninspired futuristic setting']
summary: Cyberpunk 2077 falls short of its promises and potential, resulting in an average open-world game with a good story but lacking depth and unique experiences.

Contenido: spoilersthis is one of those games where you wish steam had more than just yes or for reviews get ready for an excessive amount of commas because its time to dump some thoughtsmost of it boils down to the massive amount of bugs in the game gamebreaking and otherwise lets be real here it needed at least another six months of pure bug squashing before releasei dont know if the people that claim to have encountered zero bugs are incredibly lucky unobservant or just straight up lying i must have encountered at least hundred different bugs in under 10 hours of gameplay im not exaggerating here thankfully only three of those were gamebreaking bugs requiring to load previous save in order to continue playing with the rest being visual audio and gameplay bugs i havent experienced single crash in the time ive played so it that going for it list of bugs ive experienced at the end of the reviewcontrols are bit of mess as well because of the fairly low framerate throughout the game mouse movement feels choppy and sluggish to in addition to this the game keeps hijacking the players camera to focus on events or items which works fine on consoles but is terrible experience on kbm the keybinds also leave lot to be desired there are lot of unnecessarily separated and oddly bound keys for example numkeys 1 and 3 are used to cycle through cameras c is used for both crouch and skip diologue double tapping movement key makes you dodge and various other oddities i like to explore while characters talk and often ended up accidentally skipping fair few lines of conversation before getting fed up and changing the binds ive also fallen off rooftops and jumped out of cover by accidentally double tapping movement key microadjustments for positioning are essential so unintentional dodging is unavoidable then theres the leaning keybinds which are completely missing you can autolean by getting up close to some cover but i have yet to find game where this doesnt feel wrong on kbm i think they made an honest attempt to adapt the controls to pc but the game was clearly designed for controllers as far as graphics options go its good port very customizable and includes all the newer toys like dlss and thats good thing because dlss in particular is pretty much requirement to get playable fps the graphics look good but not good enough to justify the terrible performance obviously this will improve as new hardware comes out but i feel like they bit off more than anyone else can chew with this one for those who are fine with an inconsistent 3060fps and horrible graphics youll probably have fine time i play on an rtx 2070 super i77700k 1440p 144hz monitor installed on an ssd with dlss enabled auto ray tracing disabled and most of the settings at low or medium i also tested the game on older nvidia drivers as well as the most recent one crashing on either i switched between 1080p and 1440p often but saw negligable difference in framerate i managed to get anywhere from 30 to 70fps around the city and barely up to 100fps in some isolated missions i cant tell if the game is unoptimized or if they have too much on screen at once or both it doesnt really matter because you will need to play it in potato mode to keep the choppiness to minimum this is still far better than consoles especially when you utilize the expansive options we have on pc but not an ideal experience in any wayso i guess that brings to the gameplay and story spoilers still im not basing this review on the story overall because i havent played through the whole thing yet so far yeah its fine i like the characters and i enjoy the gunplay i even did some hacking and sneaking not my normal thing and it was good time inventory management is my least favorite thing in the world but theres plenty of inventory space and the weight limit isnt much of an issue if you allocate points in the right skill tree unfortunately i do still find myself picking over every single prop in the room looking for items even during gunfights i wish i could just focus on the shooting but theres so freakin many items to loot how can i focus on the enemy when theres loot to be hadi knew that the game was way overhyped going in so i set my expectations far lower than most people unless you absolutely need to play cyberpunk right now i recommend waiting for bug fixes better hardware and some additional optimizations that said i do like the gameplay and story so ill be continuing this breathtaking campaigni used shadowplay to record 30 or so of the worst andor funniest bugs but sadly it only recorded my desktop instead of the game youll just have to settle for this nonexhaustive list off the top of my headgamebreakingduring training course an enemy disappeared or fell through the map before i completed the objective had to load previous checkpoint to progressduring mission the quest objective did not complete as it should have but i was allowed to leave and complete side quests still had to load really old save to progressduring mission i was required to loot body to complete an objective but was unable had to load previous checkpoint to progressnon gamebreakingonce had an enemy peeking out and shooting from cover behind box all normal behavior except that was floating sideways on the box horizontally rather than upright funniest thing ive ever seen popped back into the correct orientation when i ran up close to himhad an enemy shooting at from behind cover completely behind cover killed with his gun sticking through wallcalled the car to my location but it never showed up went on hike and found it merged with another car when i got close the other car exploded and was launched across the roada character handed an object but their gun was attached to the object instead in the wrong orientation early cinematics had certain animations playing at the wrong time and then moving at double time to catch up to the rest of the sceneaudio not being synced properly during an interactive cinematicmouths not moving during cinematicsinvisible npc weaponsafter leaning out of car to shoot trying to lower weapon and go back in didnt work correctly my camera stayed in place and i was able to turn around and see my own body without headitems in npcs and characters hands constantly duplicate and remain in mid air while the original object moves as it shouldrunning on certain railingsbarriers causes you to run across them at hyperspeed for short timemotorcycles can get momentarily stuck on certain surfaces causing the front tire to bounce and slowing it to crawlhairclothesitems often disappear in mirrors and the inventory character previewvarious corpse ragdoll bugs including weird physics getting stuck in walls and occasionally exploding into gore pilesvarious ui elements permanently getting stuck on screen during gameplaynpcs constantly popping into existence right in front of menpc pathing can be funky main character once got on bike turned towards and immediately ran over before driving offallies sometimes walk at superspeed when they move to another location during missionsmany items with pickup icon are not able to be picked upsome monitors with interactable interfaces are not able to be used the camera doesnt zoom or lock to the interface but things can still be clicked on and opened with the cursordistant buildingssky sometimes disappear and display as black void until they reloadive hit the character limit with this review so ill have stop the list here

Contenido: 4510yeahyouve probably already heard all of the positive remarks about this game im not going to spend much time marking down the things i do like about elden ring but it would be disingenuous of if i didnt cop to somethingin order1 the ashes of war system is cool and the build variety it opens up is great theres lot of room for player expression moreso than previous titles and certainly more than sekiro2 certain parts of the game are breathtaking and the art direction is spot on for the most part3 theres lot of weapons armors rings etc etc its very easy to make your character look good and lot of the unique weapons feel great to play with4 fighting boss when its done right still feels pretty great that feeling when you dodge at just the right time never gets oldaaaand thats kind of it ill be honest it took minute to scrounge up even thatim just going to go over the major elements that led to scoring the game the way i didthe worldi am incredibly critical of open world games perhaps to fault ive always struggled to find merit in these types of games and they rarely if ever hook in the appeal for of an open world is the prospect of living world that i can get lost exploring in now the open world concept is essentially the tagline of elden ring and you spend an assload of time in it so how does it shape up it doesnt not even in the slightest bit now the world isnt empty let make that clear ahead of time too often do critics of this game latch onto that word and time and time again youll see the fans counter with theres tons of stuff in the world its not empty at all and theyre right theres plenty of stuff the problem is that it almost all suckstheres lot content in terms of quantity theres countless enemies dungeons and merchants but it essentially all boils down to the same routine in the overworld fight some trashmobs loot some items in dungeon fight some trashmobs loot some items kill boss wow leave theres narrative stringing you along through any of this locations barring the main quest and there towns or villages to relax or morp around in the whole world of elden ring is vast expanse of nothingness with bunch of filler riding the coattails of the main story areas lazily hidden by your horse weve seen this formula time and time again in games from developers like ubisoft usually to much criticism but is it really that much different here when you pull away the soulsy veneer ask yourself if it werent for torrent how alive would the world feel if you were stuck on footlevel designthe level design is not good im going to piss off lot of people by saying that but its true the fundamental issue with the levels in elden ring is that there is virtually reason at all to fight the enemies fromsofts design philosophy coalesces into perfect storm of ââââââââââ lot of the time where the inherent risks of fighting enemies almost always outweighs any of the incentive to do so the enemies respawn if you die even once and the runes youre going to get from the boss will far outclass anything youre gon na scrounge out of even 100 mangy dogs so why not just run through the whole thing seriously how is that not the optimal way to play youre routinely presented with situations where youre outnumbered and entirely outclassed by the level enemies and fans will tell you to fight but why you dont have to to progress the only thing in the way of you getting to the next area is the boss that always nagged about fromsoft games and its made even worse here with all of the magic spam and other teethpulling ââââââââ you have to put up with you cant tell that benny hilling around the map is good game design you just cant questlinesthe quests in this game if you can really call them that are bad theyre very bad the souls series isnt really known for its arresting side characters or engrossing bplots so this isnt too much of shock and normally wouldnt be huge problem for the issue though is that the open world nature of elden ring mutates the already pretentious questing system of previous games into even more of nuisance heres breakdown of the only quest i bothered completing with the help of guide1 meet yura bloody finger hunter underneath bridge at limgrave lake2 warns you about the dragon this is the only thing does and there is indication whatsoever of any kind of quest related to him3 ride clear across the lake into random ravine get dismounted off your horse and fight some bloodyfinger guy yura spawns in and then says some random dialogue about the guy youre fighting while you mash him4 despawns and then reappears at the very end of the ravine in cave again indication whatsoever about where hes at5 talk to him congratulates you and purrs at your martial prowess and then warns you about some crazy lady named eleonora quest over6 wrong there is now summon sign clear across the map in raya lucaria at the end of broken bridge yes you read that right7 use the summon sign fight some random npc with yura get sent back on the bridge and be careful not to miss him as hes now leaning on the railing behind you8 talk to him get an ash of war quest done9 wrong again teleports clear across the map again to random church in the atlus plateau this time you find him sprawled out neardeath on the church floor giving an operamonologue about his beloved eleonora you stand around awkwardly waiting for him to croak then loot the sword off his stillwarm body10 just as youre about to leave eleonora spawns in gasp you fight her and then get polestaff11 quest done does that not sound like the stupidest âââââââ thing youve ever heard in your entire life this appears to be the standard of elden rings quests 0 direction 0 investment and 0 idea about what the ââââ is going on the way theyre designed prevents you from ever really being the active agent in any of the quests you undertake youre not experiencing the beats of quest because you intend to they kind of just happen to occur if youre in the right place at the right time and if mercury is in retrograde and the north star is juuust bright enough coupling that with the fact that theres actual decisionmaking expected on your part you get the comedic impression that youre just some âââââââ extra at the school play whos so good at getting in the way that the actual actors in the show have to improvise some on the spot nonsense to keep the whole production from being torn down by your meddling i actually busted up laughing when yura died it almost feels intentionalconclusiontheres lot of other stuff i could touch on but im already out of space here so ill keep this brief if you like all of the other souls games you might like this i dont for all the reasons above am i going to keep playing it though yeah probably am i going to like playing it mmmmmm probably not

Contenido: backgroundmy first interaction with cd projekt red game was around 2008 some random guy told about the witcher and i tried it i loved the game even with the poor and strange combat system usually i try to play games with original voiceslanguage because translations are often inaccurate voices are too artificial and youll miss some jokes cdpr games on the other hand are good with full translation and i personally enjoy them that waysince then i became kind of fan of cdpr games and was waiting for witcher 2 i loved new models improved combat and few more features but the game was too linear in terms of map optimization wasnt good as far as i remember then came waiting times for witcher 3witcher 3 trailers were interesting the final product wasnt disappointing open world for the first time horse good amount of main story time and decent side quests i can tell much but in short it was good game dlc introduced few hour contents and second dlc was one big expansion you know old classic expansion with many missions weapons etc it had new map act i the falldid you ever hear the tragedy of cdpr the liar i thought not its not story the fanboy would tell you its the truth cdpr was decent game developing company so ethical and so playerfriendly they could use the name to influence the player base to create hype they had such knowledge of the fan side that they could even keep the ones they cared about from fleeing the business side of the company is pathway to many abilities some consider to be unnatural they became so powerful the only thing they were afraid of was losing the fan base which eventually of course they did unfortunately they learned from other big companies everything these companies knew then bad business decisions almost killed them ironic they could save their reputation from death but not anymoreafter waiting for cyberpunk for years after watching more trailers and getting more hype and after many delayed release dates we finally received the game it wasnt the company i loved anymore i heard few things since then it looks like some developers left the company and it was case of negative experience not just for players but for employees too it was the start of the fall act ii the betrayali bought the game and played for the first time recently december 2021 winter sale by now the game should have been patched fixed improved and so on if this is the case may the tech gods have mercy on cdpr souls i completed the game finished most probably all side story quest had tons of legendary stuff etc story side was good enough character models are good too you may ask what was so bad about it what makes not recommend the game to people i will tell you boy after years of mentioned delayed release dates the game not only was released in terrible state betalike but its an average game in some aspects and horrible in others i will tell you moreact iii the experiencegame poor optimization im not talking about just performance which according to some players with better pcgpu than mine is still problematic i do have good pc other than gpu and have good performance in most games audio volume is sometimes low and sometimes high i almost cant hear the radio songs but i hear the damn engine your audio software settingspresets dont matter here i have gaming mobo and use slightly modified gaming audio preset in ss3 it works in all other games so its game related audio problem there are more reasons to have negative opinion of the game npctransport appear and disappear out of nowhere sometimes i had to waste lot of time near city dump because my car stuck and all the cars on the road disappeared and there was fast travel thing nearbypoor world load after you return to the game from menus lot of objects can get stuck in other objects you cant pick some loot at alldriving physics is terrible i played many racing games and this is terrible even for nonracing game standard gta 5 game from 2013 with very arcadey physics feels amazing after cyberpunk here it feels as if indie developer tested physics dont get wrong cp physics is not just meh its really awful speaking of physics other physics related things are bad too there is funny comparison video on youtube where the author compared cyberpunk with other games cp looked like cheap indie game made in garage shooting at water takes back to ps2 timesyou cant customize protagonist after start for arasakas sake why the cyberhell you cant change even the simplest things like hair eyes in this game are implants so why not change them too tattoos cyber stuff piercing i mean even in modern times we can change faces in cyberpunk we should be able to change almost everything arm implants look generic thanks to modder this can be improved bit where are other models where is visible leg implants modelarmor choice in this game is poor you can look like scifi clown with good stats or have poor stats and look better too many iconic weapons most skill categories are poorly balanced stealth is good even without proper skills some other categories can also be ignored some implants require high levels in mentioned skill categories you have to waste points on poor skills to buy some decent implantssome implants require high street cred levels legendary arms for example other than that street cred was useless for i had to grind just to buy the damn armstoo many consumable items and proper way to use them it becomes hassleyou cant continue playing after game ending load save before final mission or return to menu witcher 3 changed this why return to the old formula ai is dumb police appears out of nowhere and wont chase you at all npc reaction to danger is very poorly executed in the gameupgrade option for some of my weapons just disappeared at one point for reason i was left with cool but weak gun its bugi hope that i havent forgotten anythingcant pick loot httpssteamcommunitycomsharedfilesfiledetailsid2692525092empty roadcars disappearedhttpssteamcommunitycomsharedfilesfiledetailsid2694224558bike acted weird jumped in air and got stuckhttpssteamcommunitycomsharedfilesfiledetailsid2696940813object loot stuck in another object httpssteamcommunitycomsharedfilesfiledetailsid2700883765lightning bughttpssteamcommunitycomsharedfilesfiledetailsid2699627602act iv the verdictif cdpr wont fix the damn bugs improve optimization i mentioned above and at least change few things like allow us to change character appearance and free roam after ending then i have more hope for this company expansion for potentially fixed game can be good sign too fixes first of course if you want to play for cdpr style story then buy with the biggest discount you can and be prepared for bugsedit 1 i mentioned few other problems Contenido: the effort it takes to enjoy cyberpunk 2077 is monumental nothing in cyberpunk 2077 stands up to anything but the most cursory scrutiny you wind your way through lively city streets packed with vendors but the one ramen shop that is functional sells you the same equivalent of caprisun and hot pockets that you can get from vending machines night city taxis mass transit or public transportation of any kind available to the player despite mission and an incredibly annoying side job prominently featuring the most luxurious taxi service eurodollars can buyat best theres conspicious hole where any player would expect function or feature at worst it becomes unclear why some systems were implemented at all the only mystery is whether it was poorly conceived or poorly implemented whether the feature was too ambitious to include from the start or whether out of sunkcost fallacy it was abandoned instead of removed altogether as it should have been and these strangenesses blend into oneanotherfor instance every single drink can be turned into crafting components but not any food and to do so means selecting each functionally identical soda and recycling them harrowing idea when you first open the easilyignored backpack icon tucked away in the corner of the inventory screen and realize youre carrying varying amounts of sixty different beverages with way to do this in bulk the game does offer you the ability to sell all your junk items masse but not the ability to mark anything as junk feature thats been offered in every other game to come before it where stream of slightly higher numbers cycles its way through your equipment furthermore an early perk automatically disassembles any junk items you pick up permanently obselescing the sell all junk feature anyway is this two halfbaked ideas or one attempt at userfriendliness rendered inconsequential by hasty later addition which one is whichthe game and setting are highly concerned with appearances but yours isnt customizable in the least outside of character creation not hair not makeup and certainly not clothing clothing is the entirety of vs protection and comprised almost entirely of what you gather from the corpses of the gang members that the police pay you to summarily execute an act that gives you street cred somehow which understandably vary wildly in quality and character if you find particular article of clothing that you really like the look of then you can upgrade it with components but at higher and higher amounts that quickly outstrip the cost of buying better equipment altogether its hard to find what armor does or tell meaningful difference so maybe the point is moot anyhow the key for reload and pick up the weapon im looking at it are the same meaning less than once every other fight does my mercenary decide in the middle of combat to trade their favorite shotgun for revolver lying on the ground that absolutely perks for annoying for sure but insufferable when i have to go to my inventory and reequip that shotgun every time it could be worse they could have had v drop it instead dangerous proposition when gun can be plainly visible but unable to be picked up except from specific position or angle or until giving up on what amounts to just one more assault rifle to sell to the nearest food stand that also buys secondhand firearmsas for the story cyberpunk 2077s narrative inconsistency of tone only exacerbated by its structure depending on which jobs you take and in what order you complete them events pivot at moments notice between comedy and tragedy invoking unremarkable primetime tv action which unresponsive naked woman will v carry today the murder victim or the rape victim surfacelevel vignettes about life in night city and the rare glimpse of sciencefiction story that might live up to the genre invoked in cyberpunk 2077s title if only it was explored every opportunity for truly compelling interrogation of alienation or identity or the power of that odious machine that is not stopped but only further lubricated by the application of bodies to its gears and wheels ends neither with satisfying conclusion or introspection but an abrupt pretty up huh before v recieves another phone callyou cant steer the course of any of these various stories short of simply not doing them and characters that openly hate and distrust v in one segment will share friendly beer or offer romance two jobs later even if the player made every attempt to make it clear theyd rather this person off story outcomes result in single line of dialogue or slightly more annoyed text message the most signficiant change ive experienced is that if v murders characters friend that character wont v be warnedjohnny silverhand flatly sucks im sure keanu reeves is trying and some of the more somber moments do allow him to pack some performance into onesentence rejoinder however johnnys not an extremist hes contrarian and the script certainly doesnt help when v is serious johnny is irreverent when johnny tries to get real its v who cracks wise johnnys attempts to get along with v amount to blackmail ultimatums and repeated attempts to violate vs bodily autonomy early on youre given medication to suppress johnny and to extend vs lifespan in 40 hours of play i was only given the option to take these pills once despite johnnys unbearable presence and vs worsening condition if i could have v would have been popping them like candyits the kind of thing where you try to put yourself in the head of cyberpunk 2077s decisionmakers there are cars in the game but theyre not customizable because that would mean more development theres store to buy these cars from so theyre sold to you via text message by your many fixers presumably because they couldnt get the voice actors back into the booth lastminute there are races in the game for better reason than that there are cars with the races arranged by bartender for some reason but youll never be outraced in the story matter how slow your truck is you can steal cars if youre strong enough to rip out the driver but your car is summonable and fasttravel points are plentiful so why because the game crime and cars would it have been disservice for v to have his or her one car how many manhours could have been saved how much better of an experience would have been delivered in the end if only few of these seemingly automatic inclusions and the everexpanding checklist of ultimately needless features had been pruned as the player you can barely control the pants v puts on in the morning or get v haircut despite being able to buy new arms or second heart so an inability to choose between compact or van seems inconsequential in comparison to that kind of rigidityjohnny and vs situation is presented early on as crossroads will johnny change v or will v change johnny the reality is that the latter never happens and the former is presented as something that you the player should encourage and pursue youd think that an antiestablishment figure like johnny would understand more than anyone that compromising your identity is just death of another kindcyberpunk 2077 with all its attempts to be anything but game of its own it shooting it rpg elements it openworld it wanted levels and hacking minigames and skill trees and origins and street races and item qualities and everything else you could ever want from aaa game should have learned that lesson because the only thing cyberpunk 2077 doesnt have is good reason to play it

Contenido: spoilersthis is one of those games where you wish steam had more than just yes or for reviews get ready for an excessive amount of commas because its time to dump some thoughtsmost of it boils down to the massive amount of bugs in the game gamebreaking and otherwise lets be real here it needed at least another six months of pure bug squashing before releasei dont know if the people that claim to have encountered zero bugs are incredibly lucky unobservant or just straight up lying i must have encountered at least hundred different bugs in under 10 hours of gameplay im not exaggerating here thankfully only three of those were gamebreaking bugs requiring to load previous save in order to continue playing with the rest being visual audio and gameplay bugs i havent experienced single crash in the time ive played so it that going for it list of bugs ive experienced at the end of the reviewcontrols are bit of mess as well because of the fairly low framerate throughout the game mouse movement feels choppy and sluggish to in addition to this the game keeps hijacking the players camera to focus on events or items which works fine on consoles but is terrible experience on kbm the keybinds also leave lot to be desired there are lot of unnecessarily separated and oddly bound keys for example numkeys 1 and 3 are used to cycle through cameras c is used for both crouch and skip diologue double tapping movement key makes you dodge and various other oddities i like to explore while characters talk and often ended up accidentally skipping fair few lines of conversation before getting fed up and changing the binds ive also fallen off rooftops and jumped out of cover by accidentally double tapping movement key microadjustments for positioning are essential so unintentional dodging is unavoidable then theres the leaning keybinds which are completely missing you can autolean by getting up close to some cover but i have yet to find game where this doesnt feel wrong on kbm i think they made an honest attempt to adapt the controls to pc but the game was clearly designed for controllers as far as graphics options go its good port very customizable and includes all the newer toys like dlss and thats good thing because dlss in particular is pretty much requirement to get playable fps the graphics look good but not good enough to justify the terrible performance obviously this will improve as new hardware comes out but i feel like they bit off more than anyone else can chew with this one for those who are fine with an inconsistent 3060fps and horrible graphics youll probably have fine time i play on an rtx 2070 super i77700k 1440p 144hz monitor installed on an ssd with dlss enabled auto ray tracing disabled and most of the settings at low or medium i also tested the game on older nvidia drivers as well as the most recent one crashing on either i switched between 1080p and 1440p often but saw negligable difference in framerate i managed to get anywhere from 30 to 70fps around the city and barely up to 100fps in some isolated missions i cant tell if the game is unoptimized or if they have too much on screen at once or both it doesnt really matter because you will need to play it in potato mode to keep the choppiness to minimum this is still far better than consoles especially when you utilize the expansive options we have on pc but not an ideal experience in any wayso i guess that brings to the gameplay and story spoilers still im not basing this review on the story overall because i havent played through the whole thing yet so far yeah its fine i like the characters and i enjoy the gunplay i even did some hacking and sneaking not my normal thing and it was good time inventory management is my least favorite thing in the world but theres plenty of inventory space and the weight limit isnt much of an issue if you allocate points in the right skill tree unfortunately i do still find myself picking over every single prop in the room looking for items even during gunfights i wish i could just focus on the shooting but theres so freakin many items to loot how can i focus on the enemy when theres loot to be hadi knew that the game was way overhyped going in so i set my expectations far lower than most people unless you absolutely need to play cyberpunk right now i recommend waiting for bug fixes better hardware and some additional optimizations that said i do like the gameplay and story so ill be continuing this breathtaking campaigni used shadowplay to record 30 or so of the worst andor funniest bugs but sadly it only recorded my desktop instead of the game youll just have to settle for this nonexhaustive list off the top of my headgamebreakingduring training course an enemy disappeared or fell through the map before i completed the objective had to load previous checkpoint to progressduring mission the quest objective did not complete as it should have but i was allowed to leave and complete side quests still had to load really old save to progressduring mission i was required to loot body to complete an objective but was unable had to load previous checkpoint to progressnon gamebreakingonce had an enemy peeking out and shooting from cover behind box all normal behavior except that was floating sideways on the box horizontally rather than upright funniest thing ive ever seen popped back into the correct orientation when i ran up close to himhad an enemy shooting at from behind cover completely behind cover killed with his gun sticking through wallcalled the car to my location but it never showed up went on hike and found it merged with another car when i got close the other car exploded and was launched across the roada character handed an object but their gun was attached to the object instead in the wrong orientation early cinematics had certain animations playing at the wrong time and then moving at double time to catch up to the rest of the sceneaudio not being synced properly during an interactive cinematicmouths not moving during cinematicsinvisible npc weaponsafter leaning out of car to shoot trying to lower weapon and go back in didnt work correctly my camera stayed in place and i was able to turn around and see my own body without headitems in npcs and characters hands constantly duplicate and remain in mid air while the original object moves as it shouldrunning on certain railingsbarriers causes you to run across them at hyperspeed for short timemotorcycles can get momentarily stuck on certain surfaces causing the front tire to bounce and slowing it to crawlhairclothesitems often disappear in mirrors and the inventory character previewvarious corpse ragdoll bugs including weird physics getting stuck in walls and occasionally exploding into gore pilesvarious ui elements permanently getting stuck on screen during gameplaynpcs constantly popping into existence right in front of menpc pathing can be funky main character once got on bike turned towards and immediately ran over before driving offallies sometimes walk at superspeed when they move to another location during missionsmany items with pickup icon are not able to be picked upsome monitors with interactable interfaces are not able to be used the camera doesnt zoom or lock to the interface but things can still be clicked on and opened with the cursordistant buildingssky sometimes disappear and display as black void until they reloadive hit the character limit with this review so ill have stop the list here
